title: Leclerc puts Ferrari back on top with British GP victory
summary: Charles Leclerc claimed victory at the British Grand Prix after an anti-climactic ending in which the safety car failed to return to pit lane one lap from the finish. title: F1 to decide before summer break on recovering Middle Eastern race
summary:
